blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 27 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
